mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO parameter ( interface_id, io_type, temporal_resolution_value, temporal_resolution_unit, temporal_range_value, temporal_range_unit, origin_point, row_count, column_count, z_count, spatial_resolution_x, spatial_resolution_y, spatial_resolution_z, spatial_resolution_unit, coverage_geom, created_at, updated_at, tensor_order ) VALUES ( #{interfaceId}, #{ioType}, #{temporalResolutionValue}, #{temporalResolutionUnit}, #{temporalRangeValue}, #{temporalRangeUnit},
ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326),
#{rowCount}, #{columnCount}, #{zCount}, #{spatialResolutionX}, #{spatialResolutionY}, #{spatialResolutionZ}, #{spatialResolutionUnit},
ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326)
ST_MakePolygon( ST_MakeLine(ARRAY[ ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326), ST_Translate(ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326), #{columnCount} * #{spatialResolutionX}, 0), ST_Translate(ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326), #{columnCount} * #{spatialResolutionX}, -#{rowCount} * #{spatialResolutionY}), ST_Translate(ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326), 0, -#{rowCount} * #{spatialResolutionY}), ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326) ]) )
ST_Force3D( ST_Extrude( ST_MakePolygon( ST_MakeLine(ARRAY[ ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326), ST_Translate(ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326), #{columnCount} * #{spatialResolutionX}, 0), ST_Translate(ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326), #{columnCount} * #{spatialResolutionX}, -#{rowCount} * #{spatialResolutionY}), ST_Translate(ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326), 0, -#{rowCount} * #{spatialResolutionY}), ST_GeomFromText(#{originPoint}, 4326) ]) ), #{zCount} * #{spatialResolutionZ} ) )
,
#{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{tensorOrder} )
mapper.select: SELECT parameter_id, interface_id, io_type, temporal_resolution_value, temporal_resolution_unit, temporal_range_value, temporal_range_unit, ST_AsText(origin_point) AS origin_point, row_count, column_count, z_count, spatial_resolution_x, spatial_resolution_y, spatial_resolution_z, spatial_resolution_unit, ST_AsText(coverage_geom) AS coverage_geom, created_at, updated_at, tensor_order FROM parameter WHERE parameter_id = #{parameterId}
